user_query: On childs day with homemade pizza spice wrap, change the first breakfast to the nectar of the gods.

updated_paths: Root > MealPlan_Version 2 > Child > Day 7 > Breakfast > Miso Breakfast Set — Maple-Kissed Skillet

update_results.path: Root > MealPlan_Version 2 > Child > Day 7 > Breakfast > Miso Breakfast Set — Maple-Kissed Skillet

meal_suggestion.from: Pair with steamed greens or a side salad; drizzle with a tiny amount of sesame oil; for more fiber, use brown rice; to reduce sodium, opt for low-sodium miso or use less miso; add extra egg or tofu to boost protein.
meal_suggestion.to: Serve this divine breakfast chilled or at room temperature, perhaps accompanied by ambrosia or fresh seasonal fruits to complement its heavenly sweetness.

short_description.from: Savory miso skillet with tofu, egg, green onion, and rice—protein-forward breakfast with comforting umami flavor.

nutrition_note.from: Protein-rich breakfast from tofu and egg with carbohydrates from rice. Contains soy and sodium from miso; gluten content depends on miso type (use gluten-free miso if needed). For more fiber, swap in brown rice or add vegetables.
nutrition_note.to: A high-energy, antioxidant-rich meal featuring natural sugars from honey and fruit, balanced with protein from yogurt. Truly a legendary start to the day.
